mapper.select: SELECT dgt.*, t.id as t_id, t.teacher_no, t.name as t_name, t.department_id, t.title, t.email, t.phone, t.status FROM defense_group_teacher dgt LEFT JOIN teacher t ON dgt.teacher_id = t.id WHERE dgt.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY dgt.is_leader DESC, t.id ASC

SELECT dgt.*, t.id as t_id, t.teacher_no, t.name as t_name, t.department_id, t.title, t.email, t.phone, t.status FROM defense_group_teacher dgt LEFT JOIN teacher t ON dgt.teacher_id = t.id WHERE dgt.group_id = #{groupId} AND dgt.is_leader = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO defense_group_teacher (group_id, teacher_id, is_leader) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{teacherId}, #{isLeader}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_leader = VALUES(is_leader)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM defense_group_teacher WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND teacher_id = #{teacherId}
mapper.update: UPDATE defense_group_teacher SET is_leader = 0 WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
UPDATE defense_group_teacher SET is_leader = 1 WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND teacher_id = #{teacherId}
